scripts.bump:patch: pnpm version patch --tag-version-prefix='ext-v' -m 'chore(extension): bump version to ext-v%s'
scripts.bump:minor: pnpm version minor --tag-version-prefix='ext-v' -m 'chore(extension): bump version to ext-v%s'
scripts.bump:major: pnpm version major --tag-version-prefix='ext-v' -m 'chore(extension): bump version to ext-v%s'
scripts.push:tags: git push origin main && git push origin ext-v$npm_package_version
scripts.release:patch: pnpm run bump:patch && pnpm run push:tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run bump:minor && pnpm run push:tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm run bump:major && pnpm run push:tags
